---
id: activate-or-deactivate-a-family
title: "Activate or deactivate a family"
description: "Pass status=true to activate or status=false to deactivate the family."
sidebar_label: "Activate or deactivate a family"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/private/churchcrm-private-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Activate or deactivate a family"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/family/{familyId}/activate/{status}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Pass status=true to activate or status=false to deactivate the family.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
